title: Institute Settings
description: Manage your institute information, branding, and configuration.
noPermission: You do not have permission to edit this section.
refreshToSeeLatest: Someone else modified this. Refresh to see latest.
unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

info.title: Institute Information
info.name: Institute Name
info.departmentsDescription: Academic departments offered by this institute.
info.contactDescription: Phone numbers and email addresses for your institute.

phoneValidation.atLeastOnePrimary: At least one phone must be marked as primary.
phoneValidation.atLeastOneWhatsapp: At least one phone must be WhatsApp-enabled.
phoneValidation.invalidNumber: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.

info.line1Description: Building name, house/plot number, and street.
info.line3Description: Any extra details that help locate the institute (optional).
info.cityDescription: City, town, or village where the institute is located.
info.districtDescription: Revenue district as per government records.
info.postalCodeDescription: 6-digit Indian postal code. City, district, and state auto-fill on blur.
info.postalCodeValidation: PIN code must be exactly 6 digits.
info.postalCodeHelp: Enter the 6-digit PIN code assigned by India Post. We auto-fill the city, district, and state from it — you can still edit them afterwards.
info.pinLookupNotFound: Could not auto-fill from this PIN code. Please enter the city, district, and state manually.
info.coordinatesHelp: Latitude and longitude are optional. They are used for maps and geofenced attendance. Get them from Google Maps by right-clicking the institute location.
info.identifiersDescription: UDISE, registration numbers, and other regulatory identifiers.
info.affiliationsDescription: Affiliations with education boards (CBSE, ICSE, state boards, etc.).

branding.title: Branding
branding.logoDescription: Institute logo displayed in the header and reports. Recommended: 256×256px, PNG or SVG.
branding.faviconDescription: Browser tab icon. Recommended: 32×32px, PNG or ICO.
branding.primaryColorDescription: Main accent colour used across the interface.
branding.secondaryColorDescription: Supporting colour for backgrounds and highlights.
branding.themeDescription: Visual theme preset for the institute portal.
branding.coverImageDescription: Displayed on the login page and public profile. Recommended: 1920×480px.
branding.previewDescription: Live preview of your branding changes.
branding.colorValidation: Must be a valid hex colour (e.g. #1A2B3C).

config.title: Configuration
config.attendanceTypeDescription: How attendance is recorded — once per day or per lecture/period.
config.shiftsDescription: Define shift timings if the institute operates multiple shifts.
config.gradingSystemDescription: Set by the affiliated board. Contact support to change.
config.termStructureDescription: Academic terms/semesters for the current year.
config.sectionStrengthDescription: Default student capacity rules for sections.
config.optimalStrengthDescription: Ideal number of students per section.
config.hardMaxDescription: Absolute cap — no section can exceed this.
config.exemptionAllowedDescription: Permit exceeding the hard max with admin approval.

indian: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
